title: Smoky Croatian Lamb Stew
description: A hearty and flavorful stew featuring tender lamb and a smoky twist from the intensely smoky Croatian paprika. Perfect for a cold winter's night.
instructions: Heat a large Dutch oven over medium-high heat.
Add the lamb cubes and cook until browned on all sides, about 5 minutes.
Remove the lamb from the pot and set aside.
Add the chopped onion to the pot and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional minute.
Add the smoky paprika, caraway seeds, salt, and black pepper to the pot and cook for 1 minute.
Add the lamb broth and red wine (if using) to the pot and stir to combine.
Return the lamb to the pot and bring to a boil.
Cover the pot and transfer to the preheated oven.
Braise the lamb for 2 1/2 to 3 hours, or until tender.
Add the cubed potatoes to the pot and continue to braise for an additional 30 minutes.
Serve the stew hot, garnished with fresh parsley or thyme (if desired).
